home.title: Grézieu Tennis - Tennis Club in Grézieu-la-Varenne
home.description: Welcome to the Tennis Club of Grézieu-la-Varenne. 2 indoor courts and 2 outdoor courts.

hero.heading: Welcome to the Tennis Club of Grézieu-la-Varenne
hero.body: Join our friendly club for training, competitions and shared moments.

about.heading: Our Club
about.body: The Tennis Club of Grézieu-la-Varenne welcomes you in a pleasant setting with 2 indoor courts and 2 outdoor courts. Whether you are a beginner or a competitor, come share our passion for tennis.

facilities.heading: Our Facilities
facilities.body: Enjoy our 4 tennis courts: 2 indoor courts to play all year round and 2 outdoor courts to enjoy the sunny days.

contact.heading: Contact Us
contact.body: Come visit us or contact us for any information about memberships and club activities.

training.title: Training - Grézieu Tennis
training.description: Discover our tennis training for all levels in Grézieu-la-Varenne.

hero.heading: Training
hero.body: Lessons adapted to all levels, supervised by qualified coaches.

adults.heading: Adult Lessons
adults.body: Adapted time slots for adults, from beginner to competitor. Group and individual lessons available throughout the season.

youth.heading: Tennis School
youth.body: Introduction and improvement for young players aged 4 to 18. Mini-tennis, tennis school and competition training.

schedule.heading: Lesson Schedule
schedule.body: Training takes place Monday to Saturday. Contact us to find out about available time slots.

news.title: News & Events - Grézieu Tennis
news.description: Follow the news and events of the Tennis Club of Grézieu-la-Varenne.

hero.heading: News & Events
hero.body: Stay informed about club life, tournaments and upcoming events.

tournaments.heading: Tournaments
tournaments.body: The club regularly organises internal tournaments and FFT-approved competitions. Check the calendar for upcoming dates.

events.heading: Club Events
events.body: Evenings, open days, club celebrations... Find all the activities that bring our association to life.

board.title: Board - Grézieu Tennis
board.description: Discover the management team of the Tennis Club of Grézieu-la-Varenne.

hero.heading: Board of Directors
hero.body: The team of volunteers who bring the club to life every day.

team.heading: Our Team
team.body: The board of directors is made up of passionate volunteers who work for the development of the club and the well-being of its members.

roles.heading: Organisation
roles.body: President, treasurer, secretary and board members meet regularly to manage club activities and prepare events.

sponsoring.title: Sponsoring - Grézieu Tennis
sponsoring.description: Become a partner of the Tennis Club of Grézieu-la-Varenne.

hero.heading: Sponsoring
hero.body: Support the club and gain visibility among our members.

partnership.heading: Become a Partner
partnership.body: By becoming a partner of the Tennis Club of Grézieu-la-Varenne, you support local sport and benefit from visibility among our members and visitors.

benefits.heading: Partner Benefits
benefits.body: Logo on our communication materials, presence at events, visibility on our website and social media.

contact.title: Info & Contact - Grézieu Tennis
contact.description: Contact the Tennis Club of Grézieu-la-Varenne. Address, phone and email.

hero.heading: Info & Contact
hero.body: All the information to join us or get in touch.

info.heading: Our Details
info.body: Don't hesitate to contact us for any questions about memberships, fees or club activities.

access.heading: Getting to the Club
access.body: The club is located at 1 Route du Col-de-la-Luere, 69290 Grézieu-la-Varenne. Parking available on site.
